message:
fix(scorecard): include flagged kills in "reasoning documented" signal

The "Kill reasoning documented" signal only considered transition-based
kills, ignoring hypotheses marked with killed=true that have kill_reason.
This meant sessions with flagged kills and documented reasoning got no
credit for the reasoning signal.

Fix:
- Added totalKillsWithReasoning combining both sources
- Changed signal to use "at least one has reasoning" (consistent with
  other signals like "Kill linked to test result")
- Added tests for flagged kills with reasoning and test links

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
